metadata.title: RoomSwift | Smart Hospitality Platform for Pakistan
metadata.description: QR ordering, guest service automation, and realtime operations dashboards for hotels and restaurants in Pakistan.

guest.notePlaceholder: Add spice level, timing, or delivery notes...
guest.noRequests: Orders and service requests for this location will appear here.
guest.requestError: We could not place this request. Please try again.
guest.trackingLive: Your request status updates here in realtime.
guest.noLiveOrdersDescription: Place an order or service request to track progress here.
guest.connectedDescription: RoomSwift keeps guests, kitchen, service teams, and managers aligned from scan to fulfillment.

hotSellers.title: Guest Favorites
hotSellers.subtitle: Best-selling menu items based on live order activity.
hotSellers.empty: Top-selling items will appear once orders start coming in.

feedback.title: How was this experience?
feedback.subtitle: Guest feedback helps management improve service quality and staff performance.
feedback.commentPlaceholder: Share what went well or what should improve...
feedback.error: Feedback could not be saved right now.
feedback.noFeedback: Guest feedback will appear here after completed requests.

supabase.fallbackDescription: RoomSwift is using secure local fallback data until your Supabase project is connected.

install.title: Install RoomSwift
install.description: Save RoomSwift to the home screen for faster guest and staff access.

home.headline: More orders.
home.description: RoomSwift helps hotels and restaurants in Pakistan accept QR orders, automate guest requests, and run kitchen, service, and management workflows from one realtime platform.
home.featuresTitle: Turn guest requests into managed revenue
home.featuresSubtitle: A premium, simple operating system for faster service, cleaner coordination, and better guest experiences.
home.pricingDescription: Start with one property, then scale to multiple outlets, hotel floors, restaurants, and service teams as your operation grows.
home.ctaDescription: Use RoomSwift to reduce phone calls, missed requests, and staff confusion while increasing order volume and guest satisfaction.
home.copyright: 2026 RoomSwift Smart Hospitality Systems. All rights reserved.

qrFirst.title: QR Ordering Without an App
qrFirst.description: Guests scan a room or table QR code, browse the menu, request service, and track progress without downloading anything.

realtime.title: Instant Team Alerts
realtime.description: Kitchen and service teams receive requests immediately, so fewer orders are missed and guests know what is happening.

staff.title: Clear Staff Handoffs
staff.description: Separate queues for food, housekeeping, maintenance, and service keep teams accountable from request to completion.

insights.title: Manager Revenue Insights
insights.description: Track popular items, response times, pending work, and location-wise demand to improve staffing and boost revenue.

guest.title: Guest Portal
guest.description: A mobile-first ordering and service experience for rooms and tables.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Queue
kitchen.description: Prioritize live food orders and reduce preparation delays.

valet.title: Service Queue
valet.description: Coordinate water, towels, cleaning, maintenance, and room service.

manager.title: Manager Suite
manager.description: Monitor operations, QR locations, feedback, and performance.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: For independent restaurants, guest houses, and boutique hotels ready to digitize ordering and service requests.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: For busy hotels and restaurants that need faster fulfillment, branded guest screens, and team-level controls.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For hotel groups, multi-branch restaurants, and premium properties that need tailored rollout and integrations.

staffPortal.title: Staff Workspaces
staffPortal.description: Give every team a focused queue so orders move faster and managers can see accountability in realtime.
staffPortal.kitchenDescription: Accept food orders, manage preparation flow, and mark items complete as soon as they are ready for service.
staffPortal.valetDescription: Manage housekeeping, maintenance, water, towels, and guest support from one clear fulfillment queue.

qrLibrary.title: Room and Table QR Library
qrLibrary.description: Generate print-ready QR codes for rooms, tables, reception desks, and service counters. Each code opens the right guest ordering flow instantly.
qrLibrary.setup: Use these QR codes on room cards, table tents, menus, or reception signage so guests can order and request service without calling staff.

offline.title: RoomSwift is temporarily offline
offline.description: Your device appears to be offline. Once the network is back, refresh the page to resume guest requests and realtime staff updates.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This RoomSwift page is not available. Open a live room link to continue.

kitchen.title: Food order command center
kitchen.description: Accept, prepare, and complete live food orders from hotel rooms and restaurant tables.

valet.title: Guest service fulfillment flow
valet.description: Handle housekeeping, maintenance, water, towels, and in-room service requests from one live operations queue.

toast.tryAgain: Please try again in a moment.

staffDashboard.title: Live request operations
staffDashboard.description: Monitor all incoming orders and service calls, accept tasks quickly, and keep guests updated in realtime.

stats.totalTodayDetail: All orders and service requests created today.

staffDashboard.emptyDescription: New room orders, table orders, and service calls will appear here in realtime.

menu-1.name: Club Sandwich
menu-1.description: Triple-layer chicken sandwich with fries, coleslaw, and signature sauce.

menu-2.name: Chicken Biryani
menu-2.description: Aromatic basmati rice, tender chicken, raita, and fresh salad.

menu-3.name: Zinger Burger
menu-3.description: Crispy chicken fillet with cheese, lettuce, and house mayo.

menu-4.name: Karak Chai
menu-4.description: Freshly brewed Pakistani tea served hot with biscuits.

menu-5.name: Cappuccino
menu-5.description: Fresh espresso with steamed milk for room or table service.

menu-6.name: Mint Lemonade
menu-6.description: Chilled lemon and mint cooler for a refreshing break.

notes.mildSpicy: Please keep the spice level mild.

service-1.name: Mineral Water
service-1.description: Request chilled mineral water for the room.

service-2.name: Fresh Towels
service-2.description: Get clean towels delivered by the service team.

service-3.name: Housekeeping Refresh
service-3.description: Request a quick room refresh from housekeeping.

service-4.name: Maintenance Support
service-4.description: Report AC, TV, light, Wi-Fi, or fixture issues instantly.

service-5.name: Wake-up Call
service-5.description: Schedule a morning wake-up call with reception.

service-6.name: Tea Tray Setup
service-6.description: Request a tea tray with cups, kettle, and sugar sachets.

deploymentSetup.title: Deployment Setup
deploymentSetup.description: Connect every QR location to the right team: guests order from rooms or tables, kitchen handles food, service handles fulfillment, and managers track performance.

header.title: Hospitality control center
header.description: Manage QR locations, monitor staff queues, review guest feedback, and spot revenue opportunities from one executive workspace.

stats.totalOrdersDetail: Revenue-driving food requests across rooms and tables.
stats.pendingRequestsDetail: Items still waiting for team action.

qr.title: QR Management
qr.heading: Generate hotel room and restaurant table QR codes
qr.description: Hotel QR codes route guests to room service. Restaurant QR codes route diners to table ordering with food-only ordering enabled.
qr.empty: Create or select an ID to generate its unique QR code.

teams.kitchenDescription: Monitor prep flow, kitchen throughput, and active room or table orders.
teams.valetDescription: Track water, towels, cleaning, maintenance, and in-room service from one queue.
teams.guestDescription: Open a live guest room route and review the QR ordering journey.

analytics.emptyDescription: Orders and service requests will populate these management insights.

side.responseDescription: Average completion turnaround based on request timestamps.
side.reportDescription: Create shift briefs, print summaries, and review guest demand patterns for better staffing and service planning.

sidebarServices.title: Available Services
sidebarServices.description: Manager-side quick view of currently available guest-facing services and menu items.
